sentences.text: The Water-rat thought the question was silly and did not understand why they asked.
He said he would expect his devoted friend to always be loyal to him.
The Duck stood on her head in the water to teach her children how to behave.
The Water-rat seemed to think that friendship was all about others being devoted to him.
